title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Practo Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Practo Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Practo Advisory Limited family as a Backend Developer in Allahabad. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Practo Advisory Limited:
Practo Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Allahabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Practo Advisory Limited!
